info.title: හිත (Hitha) API Documentation
info.description: REST API specifications and documentation for the Hitha digital mental health platform.

tags.name: Utility - File Uploads
tags.description: Utility endpoints for file uploads (profile pictures, SLMC license files, certificates)

tags.name: General Auth
tags.description: Shared authentication utilities (OTP dispatch, token refresh, logout, password resets)

tags.name: Doctor Profiles
tags.description: Endpoints for authenticated doctors to fetch, update, and manage their profiles and online status

tags.name: Session Documents
tags.description: Endpoints for ephemeral document sharing during live consultation sessions

tags.name: Doctor Blocked Dates
tags.description: Endpoints for doctors to block scheduling availability for vacations or leave

tags.name: Admin Price Request Management
tags.description: Endpoints for administrators to list, approve, or reject price requests

tags.name: Doctor Availability
tags.description: Endpoints for doctors to configure their slots templates and schedule availability

tags.name: Admin Blogs
tags.description: Administrative endpoints for reviewing and managing mental health articles

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Endpoints for creating slot bookings and retrieving patient appointments

tags.name: Doctor Auth
tags.description: Endpoints for doctor registration, login, and forgot password

tags.name: Admin Auth
tags.description: Endpoints for Admin authentication, password resets, and registration

tags.name: Public Blogs
tags.description: Public and authenticated endpoints for mental health articles discovery, publishing, and interaction

tags.name: User Security Settings
tags.description: Endpoints for authenticated users (doctors/patients/admins) to update their contact details

tags.name: Admin Profiles
tags.description: Endpoints for administrators to review and manage doctor registration applications and statuses

tags.name: Doctor Discovery
tags.description: Public/Patient-facing endpoints for searching, filtering, and viewing doctor public profiles

tags.name: Doctor Price Requests
tags.description: Endpoints for doctors to submit and view custom price request history

tags.name: Payment Webhooks
tags.description: Endpoints for PayHere server-to-server notifications

tags.name: Admin Management
tags.description: Endpoints for Super Admin to manage sub-admins

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Endpoints for joining consultation rooms and managing session-level state

tags.name: Payment
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving signed gateway checkout parameters

get.description: Retrieves a summary of the logged-in doctor's profile (e.g. name, rating, status).

put.description: Updates profile fields such as name, bio, languages, and degree documents for the logged-in doctor.

delete.description: Hard-deletes the doctor's profile and deactivates the user account.

get.description: Retrieves the full content and details of a specific blog post by ID.

put.description: Updates the content of an existing blog draft or submits it for review.

post.description: Receives asynchronous payment status notifications from PayHere.
Verifies the OTP sent to the new phone number and saves the updated phone number to the profile.
Initiates a phone number change. Dispatches an OTP verification code to the new phone number.

get.description: Retrieves all consultation appointments booked by the authenticated patient user.

post.description: Public endpoint to book available consultation slots. Auto-provisions the patient profile and auth user if they don't exist.
Generates a LiveKit video token and room URL for the authenticated patient.

get.description: Lists all documents uploaded during the active session.

post.description: Uploads a private file to share with the doctor during an active session.
Uploads a multipart file (e.g. image, PDF) to the configured storage provider (Local/S3/Cloudinary) and returns the public URL.
Allows a doctor to update their weekly availability configurations and generate actual time slots.
Generates a LiveKit video token and room URL for the assigned doctor.

get.description: Lists all documents uploaded during the active session.

post.description: Uploads a private file to share with the patient during an active session.

get.description: Allows a doctor to view their own price requests history

post.description: Allows a doctor to request a new custom slot price
Saves onboarding info such as bio, gender, languages, and qualifications to mark the profile complete.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all currently blocked dates for the authenticated doctor.

post.description: Blocks a specific date for a doctor, cancelling any unbooked slots on that date.
Registers a new doctor profile in PENDING_VERIFICATION state. Requires SLMC license details if Consultant.
Authenticates a doctor using credentials (email/phone and password). Rejects login if status is PENDING_APPROVAL or SUSPENDED.
Resets the doctor's password using the OTP code received via email and revokes all active sessions.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated, filtered, and sorted list of published mental health articles.

post.description: Creates a new blog post as a DRAFT or submits it directly for administrator review.
Increments and logs the share count for a specific blog article.
Toggles the like status of a blog article for the authenticated user.
Checks whether a password reset token is valid and has not expired.
Verifies SMS OTP code and returns access/refresh JWT tokens if successful.
Sends a new SMS verification code to a patient for passwordless login.
Resets the user's password using a verified email token and signs out all active sessions.
Generates a new pair of access and refresh tokens using a valid refresh token.
Logs out the user by revoking the specified refresh token in the database.
Revokes all active refresh tokens for the authenticated user.
Dispatches a password reset URL/token to the user's registered email address.

post.summary: Verify Admin SMS OTP / Email Token
post.description: Verifies SMS OTP code or Email link UUID token to mark contact information verified.
Dispatches a new SMS verification code to the Administrator's phone number.
Registers a new Administrator using a valid invitation token.
Rejects a pending price request with a given reason
Approves a pending price request and updates future available slot pricing
Authenticates an Administrator using credentials (email/phone and password).
Generates and returns an invitation token for a new Administrator.
Resends an active administrator invitation and returns the email and expiration info.
Resets the Admin password using an email verification token and invalidates active sessions.
Changes a doctor's active status (e.g. SUSPENDED, ACTIVE), and logs out any active JWT sessions if suspended.
Rejects a doctor's pending registration application, changing status to REJECTED and adding rejection reason.
Approves a doctor's pending registration application, changing status to ACTIVE.
Rejects a pending blog post, changing its status back to DRAFT and providing rejection notes.
Approves a pending blog post, changing its status to PUBLISHED and making it visible publicly.

patch.description: Patient can reveal or conceal their display name to the doctor during a session.
Updates the doctor's availability status (e.g. ACTIVE, SUSPENDED).
Sets/updates the profile picture image URL for the logged-in doctor.
Suspends an administrator account to block their API access.
Updates an existing administrator's operational role and revokes active sessions.
Lifts the suspension on an administrator account to restore their access.

get.description: Streams the private document with Content-Disposition inline for browser viewing.
Streams the private document as an attachment. Doctor is forbidden from downloading patient-uploaded documents.
Retrieves a paginated list of active doctors matching optional search criteria (name, category, language, gender, price).
Retrieves the public profile details and available slots of a doctor for patient-facing discovery.
Retrieves fresh signed gateway checkout parameters to retry payment for a pending booking.
Retrieves the full profile details, SLMC details, and certification links of the logged-in doctor.
Retrieves a paginated list of administrator accounts and active invitations, filtered by status or name.
Fetch price requests, optionally filtered by status
Retrieves a paginated list of doctor profiles, filtered by status or name search.
Retrieves the full profile details of a doctor by ID.
Retrieves a paginated list of blog articles submitted by doctors awaiting admin approval.

delete.description: Deletes a blocked date entry and restores the doctor's weekly template slots for that date.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT bearer token to authenticate requests.
bearerAuth.name: bearerAuth
